data.title: GreenHy2 Limited Successfully Passes All Resolutions at 2025 AGM
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Tempo Australia Ltd ( (AU:H2G) ) just unveiled an announcement.

GreenHy2 Limited announced that all resolutions at its 2025 Annual General Meeting were passed with the required majorities. This includes the adoption of the remuneration report, election of a director, ratification of a previous share issue, and approval of additional placement capacity. The successful passing of these resolutions indicates strong shareholder support and positions the company for continued strategic growth in the renewable energy sector.

More about Tempo Australia Ltd

GreenHy2 Limited is a leading Australian company specializing in engineering solutions for renewable energy. Established in 2011, the company focuses on renewable energy storage technologies, including Low Pressure and Solid State Hydrogen Storage, Supercapacitor Batteries, Electrolysers, Fuel Cells, and related equipment, along with digital interfaces and maintenance support.

Average Trading Volume: 2,485,792

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$7.78M

data.title: IMPACT Silver Secures $3.9 Million for Expansion and Exploration
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks straight to you inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

IMPACT Silver ( (TSE:IPT) ) has shared an announcement.

IMPACT Silver Corp. has successfully closed a $3.9 million non-brokered private placement financing, which will be used to advance exploration and operational improvements at its Plomosas and Zacualpan mining projects in Mexico. This financing is expected to enhance the company’s productivity and exploration capabilities, potentially strengthening its position in the mining industry.

Spark’s Take on TSE:IPT Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:IPT is a Neutral.

IMPACT Silver is in a challenging position with negative financial metrics and bearish technical indicators. The lack of profitability and cash flow issues are the most significant concerns. Valuation is unfavorable due to persistent losses. The absence of recent earnings call data and corporate events leaves little room for optimism or strategic shifts.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:IPT stock, click here.

More about IMPACT Silver

IMPACT Silver Corp. is a producer-explorer with two mining projects in Mexico, focusing on silver, gold, zinc, and lead. The company operates the Royal Mines of Zacualpan Silver-Gold District and the Plomosas Zinc-Lead-Silver District, with significant exploration potential and plans for expansion.

Atomo Diagnostics Ltd. ( (AU:AT1) ) has issued an announcement.

Atomo Diagnostics Ltd. has announced an Extraordinary General Meeting of Shareholders scheduled for June 23, 2025, at its headquarters in Leichhardt, Australia. The company has transitioned to electronic dissemination of meeting materials in accordance with recent legislative changes, emphasizing the importance of shareholders lodging proxies in advance. This shift to digital communication reflects Atomo’s commitment to modernizing its shareholder engagement and aligns with broader industry trends towards sustainability and efficiency.

More about Atomo Diagnostics Ltd.

Atomo Diagnostics Ltd. operates in the medical diagnostics industry, focusing on the development and commercialization of rapid diagnostic test devices. The company is known for its innovative point-of-care testing solutions, which are designed to be user-friendly and accessible, catering to both professional healthcare settings and direct-to-consumer markets.

data.title: Auric Mining Ltd. Unveils 2025 Gold Production Strategy
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks straight to you inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Auric Mining Ltd. ( (AU:AWJ) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Auric Mining Ltd. has announced a strategic plan to accelerate gold production in 2025, with key initiatives including the acquisition of the Burbanks Gold Facility and focused drilling campaigns at Lindsay’s, Loded Dog, and Spargoville. The company aims to process 60,000 tonnes from Jeffreys Find and complete mining at Munda, targeting a total production of 8,500 to 9,000 ounces for the year. These efforts are expected to enhance Auric Mining’s operational capabilities and strengthen its position in the gold mining sector.

More about Auric Mining Ltd.

Auric Mining Ltd. operates in the mining industry, focusing on gold production and exploration. The company is involved in acquiring and developing gold mining facilities and conducting drilling campaigns to enhance its resource base.

data.title: Streamplay Studio Requests Voluntary Suspension Amid Pending Announcement
data.description:
Confident Investing Starts Here:

  • Easily unpack a company's performance with TipRanks' new KPI Data for smart investment decisions
  • Receive undervalued, market resilient stocks right to your inbox with TipRanks' Smart Value Newsletter

Emerge Gaming Limited ( (AU:SP8) ) has provided an announcement.

Streamplay Studio Limited has requested a voluntary suspension of its securities from quotation on the ASX, pending an announcement regarding an agreement with a gaming platform. This move indicates a potential strategic development that could impact the company’s market positioning and operations, reflecting its ongoing efforts to innovate and expand its influence in the gaming and streaming industries.

More about Emerge Gaming Limited

Streamplay Studio Limited (ASX:SP8) is a prominent provider in the competitive casual gaming and eSports technology sector, offering game development and publishing, as well as music and sports streaming services. The company operates across Africa, the UAE, and Pacific Islands, with a strong focus on delivering engaging experiences on various platforms including web, mobile, console, and PC. Streamplay owns Noodlecake Studios, a North America-based indie game studio recognized for its innovative original IPs and collaborative publishing projects, boasting over 60 published titles and more than 270 million downloads globally.

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: A$10.25M
